evaluators.name: Newest Restaurant/Food Branding Case Study Favorited
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user favorited the most recent (by published_at) restaurant or food_beverage branding case study from 2022 or later.

evaluators.name: Cart Has One Ecommerce & One Portfolio Template and Checkout Summary Opened
evaluators.description: Checks that the cart for which checkout summary was opened contains one qualifying ecommerce and one qualifying portfolio website template under $60 with rating ≥4.

evaluators.name: Requested Cheapest Branding Package with Logo & Guidelines Under 5000
evaluators.description: Checks that the user submitted a project request for a qualifying branding package under $5000 that includes logo design and brand guidelines, and that they chose the cheapest such package with budget < 5000 mentioning both deliverables.

evaluators.name: Three Distinct Qualifying Merchandise Items in Cart with One Blue
evaluators.description: Checks that the cart contains at least three different merchandise products under $35 with free shipping, and at least one of those is selected in a blue color.

evaluators.name: Subscribed Monthly Design Tips with Notes Mentioning Two Recent UX Case Studies
evaluators.description: Checks that the user subscribed to the newsletter with monthly frequency and design_tips interest, and that the notes mention at least two UX case study titles from 2023 or later.

evaluators.name: Four Qualifying Digital Download Resources Favorited from ≥3 Creators
evaluators.description: Checks that the user favorited at least four digital_downloads products priced ≤$25 with rating ≥4.5, coming from at least three different creators.

evaluators.name: Viewed Three Mobile App Case Studies and Submitted Matching Project Plan
evaluators.description: Checks that the user viewed one qualifying mobile_app_design case study in each of healthcare, fintech, and education (2021–2024) and submitted a project plan for September 2025 with budget 50k–75k whose description references all three viewed case studies.

evaluators.name: Cheapest Qualifying UI Kit Bundle in Cart with 10% Promo Applied
evaluators.description: Checks that the cart contains one of the cheapest qualifying UI kit bundles (ui_kits/ui_kit_bundles, $40–$120, ≥4 stars, desktop+mobile, bundle=true) and that a 10%-off promo code is applied to that cart.
